entry.title: Dietary Fibers and Prebiotics for Gut Microbiota Modulation in Type 2 Diabetes: Mechanisms and Therapeutic Potential

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: IC Crăciun, DC Măgureanu, IC Bocsan, AE Crăciun... - Diabetology, 2026

Abstract: ... Many dietary fibers and prebiotic compounds escape digestion in the upper gastrointestinal tract and reach the colon, where they interact directly with intestinal microbes, exerting prebiotic effects, reshaping microbial communities, and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Physical and Biochemical Properties of Chan (Hyptis suaveolens (L.) Poit) Seeds Grown in Different Locations

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: JA Salazar‐Montoya, MD Díaz‐Cervantes... - Food Science & Nutrition, 2026

Abstract: The main goal of this work was to establish the differences in the physical properties and nutritional quality of chan seeds ( Hyptis suaveolens (L.) Poit) as well as to determine their influence on the structural characteristics. In this study, three sites ...

entry.title: An Idea to Explore: From How to Why: Using Evolutionary Biochemistry to Inspire Biochemistry Education

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Vázquez‐Salazar - Biochemistry and Molecular Biology Education, 2026

Abstract: ... This approach also integrates insights from origins - of - life studies, which trace plausible trajectories from prebiotic reaction networks to the highly regulated, enzymedriven systems of modern cells [5–7]. When applied to teaching, these ...

entry.title: Exploring the Diversity of Sub - Neptune -Sized Exoplanets
entry.content:
Authors: S Palma, G Morello, G Fernandez, J Tan - American Astronomical Society Meeting ..., 2026

Abstract: ... alien worlds with precise detail, thanks to the launch of the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). Early JWST observations have highlighted a profound diversity among exoplanets, revealing a highly abundant population of sub - Neptune -... the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets
